map.alt: Blank outline map of the world

items.label: Great Pyramid of Giza
items.hint: The last surviving Ancient Wonder of the World, near modern Cairo.

items.label: Great Wall of China
items.hint: A fortification system stretching thousands of miles across northern China.

items.label: Colosseum
items.hint: An enormous amphitheater at the heart of ancient Rome.

items.label: Machu Picchu
items.hint: An Inca citadel perched high in the Peruvian Andes.

items.label: Taj Mahal
items.hint: A marble mausoleum built by a Mughal emperor in Agra, India.

items.label: Statue of Liberty
items.hint: A gift from France, standing in New York Harbor since 1886.
